div.head:
No. 301
Editorial Note
div.p: The final item discussed by the Foreign Ministers during the afternoon session on October 16 was the date for the next meeting of the North Atlantic Council, which was to be held in Paris. Bidault stated that the French Presidential elections might interfere with a December session, but promised to advise his colleagues further. (Secto 9 from London, October 16, 396.1 LO/10–1653) The following day Bidault reported that December 17–20 appeared to be the best dates for the meeting and promised to do his best to keep the French elections from conflicting with it. (Secto 18 from London, October 17, 396.1 LO/10–1753)
